metadata.description: Pair with Claude Code instead of reviewing its output after the fact.

plugins.name: deeppairing
plugins.description: Turn Claude Code into a thinking partner: structured findings / specs / options / plans you shape in a local companion UI, concept-naming for learning, and a rejection gate that stops a concept you've turned down before the edit lands — in the project where you rejected it, with an advisory cross-project flag everywhere else — so your taste compounds.
